queries.final_sql:
SELECT leaf_1.au_lname || ' ' || leaf_1.au_fname AS author_name
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.au_id, leaf_1.au_lname, leaf_1.au_fname, leaf_1.ytd_sales FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.ytd_sales
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.ytd_sales DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select leaf_1.au_lname || ' ' || leaf_1.au_fname as author_name from (select leaf_1.au_id, leaf_1.au_lname, leaf_1.au_fname, leaf_1.ytd_sales from (select a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.ytd_sales from authors as a join titleauthor as ta on a.au_id = ta.au_id join titles as t on ta.title_id = t.title_id) as leaf_1 order by leaf_1.ytd_sales desc limit 1) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.author_count)
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ta.au_id) AS author_count
FROM titles t
JOIN titleauthor ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN publishers pub ON t.pub_id = pub.pub_id
WHERE (pub.pub_id = '1389')
GROUP BY t.title_id) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.author_count) from (select t.title_id, count(distinct ta.au_id) as author_count from titles as t join titleauthor as ta on t.title_id = ta.title_id join publishers as pub on t.pub_id = pub.pub_id where (pub.pub_id = '1389') group by t.title_id) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT SUM((price * qty) * (1 - COALESCE(discount, 0) / 100)) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, titles.price, sales.qty, sales.ord_date, publishers.pub_name, stores.state, discounts.discounttype, discounts.discount
FROM titles
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
LEFT JOIN discounts ON sales.stor_id = discounts.stor_id AND sales.qty BETWEEN discounts.lowqty AND discounts.highqty
WHERE (titles.type = 'business') AND (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems') AND (stores.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select sum((price * qty) * (1 - coalesce(discount, 0) / 100)) as total_revenue from (select titles.title_id, titles.title, titles.price, sales.qty, sales.ord_date, publishers.pub_name, stores.state, discounts.discounttype, discounts.discount from titles join sales on titles.title_id = sales.title_id join stores on sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id join publishers on titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id left join discounts on sales.stor_id = discounts.stor_id and sales.qty between discounts.lowqty and discounts.highqty where (titles.type = 'business') and (publishers.pub_name = 'algodata infosystems') and (stores.state = 'ca')) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT pub_name
FROM (SELECT pub_name, AVG(royaltyper) AS avg_royaltyper FROM (SELECT p.pub_name, t.title, ta.royaltyper
FROM publishers p
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
JOIN titleauthor ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id) GROUP BY pub_name) AS avg_royalties
WHERE (avg_royaltyper = (SELECT MAX(avg_royaltyper) FROM (SELECT AVG(royaltyper) AS avg_royaltyper FROM (SELECT p.pub_name, t.title, ta.royaltyper
FROM publishers p
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
JOIN titleauthor ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id) GROUP BY pub_name)))

signature.normalized_sql: select pub_name from (select pub_name, avg(royaltyper) as avg_royaltyper from (select p.pub_name, t.title, ta.royaltyper from publishers as p join titles as t on p.pub_id = t.pub_id join titleauthor as ta on t.title_id = ta.title_id) group by pub_name) as avg_royalties where (avg_royaltyper = (select max(avg_royaltyper) from (select avg(royaltyper) as avg_royaltyper from (select p.pub_name, t.title, ta.royaltyper from publishers as p join titles as t on p.pub_id = t.pub_id join titleauthor as ta on t.title_id = ta.title_id) group by pub_name)))
